isOpen.description: Specifies whether the about panel is initially open or closed

aboutTitle.description: The text that shows in the aria-label and at the very top of the About Panel

iconPath.description: A path to an icon that will be used instead of the default icon for the about button

mdPath.description: The relative path to a Markdown document to be embedded. Will override other configs.

mdContent.description: A list of markdown items to add to the page

title.description: The title for the about page

logoPath.description: A relative path to an image logo to be placed under the title

description.description: A description for the about panel

link.description: A link to a website or page to direct users

version.description: The schema version used to validate the configuration file. The schema should enumerate the list of versions accepted by this version of the viewer.
